hero.style: Full-width with background video, text center aligned. Use overlay bg-black/50 to ensure text readability.
hero.typography: Use H1 scale for the main agency tagline.

service_cards.style: Cardless or 1px border. bg-zinc-950 border border-white/10 rounded-none. Inner padding p-8 md:p-12.
service_cards.hover: Hover state should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and change border to border-white/30 with a subtle glow.

navigation.style: Sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10. Include a language toggle (DE/EN) and a primary CTA.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white text-white px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors rounded-none

contact_form.style: Use customized Shadcn UI Form and Input components. Strip away Vercel-look borders and use dark transparent backgrounds (bg-white/5) with bottom borders or 1px subtle borders.

motion.scroll: Use Lenis for premium smooth scrolling.
motion.transitions: Framer Motion for page transitions and staggered reveals for grids.
motion.hover: Subtle, non-distracting scale and brightness changes on cards/images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme across all pages. Ensure high contrast.
Implement routing for multi-page structure (Home, Services, Portfolio, Admin Dashboard).
Integrate a language switcher (German as default, English fallback) in the navigation.
Implement the Contact Form section with Google Maps integration and connect the form to a database.
Create the Admin Dashboard to manage and view contacts using Shadcn components (Tables, Cards).
All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute for testing (e.g., `data-testid="contact-submit-button"`).
Use standard HTML tags augmented with Tailwind CSS for layout rather than heavily relying on generic section containers.
